parameters.query: SELECT * FROM appointments WHERE patient_phone = $1 AND notification_status = 'sent' ORDER BY appointment_date DESC, appointment_time DESC LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO patient_profiles (phone_number, patient_name, total_appointments, last_seen_at) VALUES ($1, $2, CASE WHEN $3::uuid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, NOW()) ON CONFLICT (phone_number) DO UPDATE SET patient_name = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.patient_name, patient_profiles.patient_name), total_appointments = patient_profiles.total_appointments + CASE WHEN $3::uuid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at = NOW() RETURNING *;

INSERT INTO conversation_sessions (appointment_id, patient_phone, patient_profile_id, status) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, 'active') ON CONFLICT (appointment_id) DO UPDATE SET last_activity_at = NOW(), message_count = conversation_sessions.message_count + 1 RETURNING *;
parameters.queryParams: ={{$node["Prepare Profile Query Info"].json.appointmentId}}, {{$node["Prepare Profile Query Info"].json.phone}}, {{$json.id}}

parameters.prompt:
=Clasifica el mensaje entrante del paciente en base a estas categorías:
- appointment_time (consulta sobre la hora de la cita)
- appointment_date (consulta sobre la fecha)
- appointment_type (consulta sobre de qué trata la cita)
- clinic_location (dónde está la clínica)
- appointment_confirmation (confirmación de asistencia)
- medical_advice (preguntas médicas, síntomas, medicamentos, tratamientos)
- reschedule_request (solicitud de modificación o cancelación)
- other (cualquier otro tema fuera de lo anterior)

Mensaje del paciente: "{{$node["Prepare Profile Query Info"].json.messageContent}}"

Responde estrictamente en formato JSON plano:
{ "topic": "nombre_topico", "confidence": 0.0-1.0 }

parameters.query: INSERT INTO patient_replies (phone_number, message_content, appointment_id, session_id, patient_profile_id, bot_response, escalation_status, conversation_log) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, 'none', $7::jsonb) RETURNING id;
parameters.queryParams: ={{$node["Prepare Profile Query Info"].json.phone}}, {{$node["Prepare Profile Query Info"].json.messageContent}}, {{$node["Prepare Profile Query Info"].json.appointmentId}}, {{$node["Upsert Session Info"].json.id}}, {{$node["Upsert Patient Profile"].json.id}}, {{$node["Layer 3 Post-Validation"].json.replyText}}, =[]

parameters.query: UPDATE conversation_sessions SET context_window = $1::jsonb WHERE id = $2;

parameters.jsCode:
const reason = $node["Route classification"].json.allowed === false ? $node["Parse Classification"].json.reason : $node["Layer 3 Post-Validation"].json.reason;
return [{ json: { reason } }];

parameters.text: Gracias por su mensaje. Un miembro del personal de la clínica se pondrá en contacto con usted en horario de consulta pronto.

parameters.query: INSERT INTO patient_replies (phone_number, message_content, appointment_id, session_id, patient_profile_id, bot_response, escalation_status, escalation_reason, conversation_log) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, 'escalated', $7, $8::jsonb);
parameters.queryParams: ={{$node["Prepare Profile Query Info"].json.phone}}, {{$node["Prepare Profile Query Info"].json.messageContent}}, {{$node["Prepare Profile Query Info"].json.appointmentId}}, {{$node["Upsert Session Info"].json.id}}, {{$node["Upsert Patient Profile"].json.id}}, 'Gracias por su mensaje...', {{$node["Amalgamate Escalation Reason"].json.reason}}, =[]

parameters.text: =Gracias por su mensaje. Nuestro de horario de atención es de {{$node["Load Bot Config"].json.config.business_hours_start}} a {{$node["Load Bot Config"].json.config.business_hours_end}}. Le responderemos en el próximo horario de trabajo.

parameters.query: INSERT INTO patient_replies (phone_number, message_content, bot_response, escalation_status, escalation_reason, conversation_log) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, 'escalated', 'outside_business_hours', =[]);
